channel.title: Teaching on Combine Art and Sciences
channel.description: Recent content in Teaching on Combine Art and Sciences

item.title: Add Hugo Teaching Tag
item.description: I begin noticing that I can write something to students Publish view-points to others is something that needs to be approached with caution. However, my students come to surround me and open their eyes widely for knowledge and thoughts. So, today I begin to use tag = Teaching for sharing some thought to my students.
